Function.Inference: Bars 1-4 establish the misterioso ostinato before the repeat sign.
Bars 5-58 contain the main waltz loop, ending with a repeat sign.

Section.Inference: Introductory ostinato pattern setting the harmonic foundation.
First statement of the main waltz theme over the pedal.
Variation of the main theme with thicker texture and counter-melody.
Contrasting section with staccato bass, building tension before resolving to loop.
